Note: Razor blades (for safety/T-razors) prohibited in carry-on. Pack in checked luggage or buy at destination.
AirFly Pro — connects AirPods to seatback screen via Bluetooth transmitter. Must have for long flights.
Multiple flights landing simultaneously = long immigration queues. No way to predict, just budget time.
Buy Octopus card at airport immediately. Works on MTR, buses, ferries, convenience stores.
Most passports: 14-90 days visa-free depending on nationality. Check HKID website.
Rooms 1.5-2x price during CNY. Book 2+ months ahead or skip the period entirely.
Oct-Nov = best time. Dry, 20-25°C, post-Golden Week, no holidays. Cheapest rooms.
E-visa Vietnam: 30 days single entry. Need proof of onward travel and accommodation. Do QR code in advance.
Feb-Apr = sweet spot. Low humidity, no rain, comfortable 25-29°C.
Sep-Nov = avoid. Flooding, typhoons, everything grey and wet.
Jun-Aug = hot but dry. 34°C + high humidity = AC life. Beach is good though.
Grab works everywhere. Airport to city center ~100k VND.
